---
title: " "
output: 
  rmarkdown::html_document:
    highlight: pygments
    number_sections: no
    self_contained: yes
    toc: no
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: yes
---

<br><br>

<center>![](efspi_logo.jpg)</center>

<br><br>

# EFSPI regulatory statistics workshop

On this webpage you find links and materials for the yearly EFSPI regulatory statistics workshop in Basel. The date for the 2023 issue has already been announced, find details [here](next.html).

The workshop is organized by [EFSPI](www.efspi.org).

For feedback and questions send an email to [info@efspiworkshop.org](mailto:info@efspiworkshop.org).
